problem id: ecf2a23b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHR(6)

examples:
  10000001 -> 00000000
  10001101 -> 00000000
  01010010 -> 00000000
  10110110 -> 00000010
  00111001 -> 00000000
  10111000 -> 00000010
  11110111 -> 00000010
  11110100 -> 00000010
  10000011 -> 00000000

query: 01100000
predicted answer: 00000000
